title: AI Watermark Studio – Gemini, Doubao & DALL·E 3
header.title: AI Watermark Studio
brand.name: Watermark Studio
main.title: AI Watermark Analysis & Removal
main.subtitle: Profile-based visible watermark detection and reverse-alpha removal. Runs locally in the browser.
upload.hint: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, folders, drag-and-drop, and clipboard paste
panel.title: Control Panel
directory.title: Automated Directory Processing
directory.desc: Select input/output folders to automatically process all images
feature.title: Features
feature.speed.title: Lightning Fast
feature.speed.desc: Based on modern browser technologies, millisecond response, no waiting queue
feature.privacy.title: Privacy First
feature.privacy.desc: Pure frontend processing, images never leave your device
feature.free.title: Completely Free
feature.free.desc: No usage limits, no hidden fees, ready to use
footer.desc: Gemini Watermark Remover, for educational purposes only
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Gemini Watermark Remover. All rights reserved.
original.not_gemini: ⚠️ This image may not be made with Gemini. Lossless processing unavailable.
original.not_original: ⚠️ This image may not be original size. Lossless processing unavailable.
original.pass: ✅ This image made with Gemini. Lossless processing supported.
batch.title: Batch Processing
audit.title: Activity Log
toast.manualSingleOnly: Open one image before using manual processing
toast.manualAreaRequired: Select or enter a manual area first
toast.detectedAreaMissing: No detected area is available yet
error.cors.detail: Security Error: {{message}}. 1. The image is from a third-party website (cross-origin). 2. Even with CORS enabled, the server may not send the correct headers. 3. Please save the image to your local device first, then drag it into this tool.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
preset.hint: Deeper scans improve detection on cropped or unusual images but take longer.
preset.hintDetail: Search: {{search}}% · DeepScan: {{deepScan}} · Jitter: ±{{jitter}}px · Fine-tune: ±{{fineTune}}px · Adaptive: {{adaptive}} · Candidates/size: {{candidates}}
manual.forceProcess: Force process (skip confidence checks for difficult images)
manual.alphaGainHint: Higher = stronger removal. Use 1.0 for normal watermarks, 1.5-2.0 for faint ones. Too high causes dark blotches.
manual.searchRangeHint: How far to search around the selected position for the exact watermark center. Increase if the watermark is slightly offset.
error.encodeFailed: Failed to encode processed image as PNG
